task: Place red utensil above the yellow cloth next to blue utensil.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A red-handled utensil rests on a yellow cloth on a wooden surface. A blue-handled utensil lies nearby. The red utensil is rigid with a handle; the yellow cloth is soft and flat. STRATEGY - Reach the red utensil at its handle for a secure grip, lift it, transport it over the yellow cloth, and place it gently on the cloth to avoid slipping. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the red utensil handle; Step 2 grasp the handle for control; Step 3 transport above the cloth; Step 4 lower onto the cloth center.

Goal: on(red_utensil, yellow_cloth); stable(red_utensil)
Scene: red_utensil, yellow_cloth, blue_utensil, table
Step 1: reach(red_utensil)
  affordance_region: the handle of the red utensil
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_utensil, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_utensil) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_utensil)
  affordance_region: the handle of the red utensil
  contact: holding(red_utensil) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_utensil)
Step 3: transport(red_utensil -> yellow_cloth)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the yellow cloth
  spatial: above(red_utensil, yellow_cloth, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_utensil)
  done_when: above(red_utensil, yellow_cloth, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_utensil -> yellow_cloth)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the yellow cloth
  contact: surface_contact(red_utensil, yellow_cloth) [completion]; released(red_utensil) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_utensil) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_utensil, yellow_cloth) AND released(red_utensil)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the handle of the red utensil
the handle of the red utensil
an empty area on the yellow cloth
an empty area on the yellow cloth
